form.formComment: Second up after running 9th (Fr4) over 1609m after showing early pace at this track beaten 25 m by War Western (1:54.30) in NR up to 53 on April 2 at $101. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third behind Quickshift Girl at this track over 2030m in a NR up to 55 M on April 2 at $3.60. Performed better the start before where she won by 12 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr5) at this track (2:28.50) beating Roses Are Best in NR up to 48 on March 28 at $2.50 at the bell was leading 6.2. Going along well. Should get every chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr9) over 1609m at Menangle, at the bell was 6th-12.96 beaten 15 m by Mcbart (1:51.70) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 31 at $26. At the previous start 10th (Fr1) over 2125m after showing early pace at Penrith beaten 85 m by Withdistinction (2:34.10) in NR up to 70 on March 12 at $4.60. Can improve from this draw and has to be included among the main chances.

May bounce back.
